info.DAtuviSezaH: guptijkidByaH san 3.1.5 ityanena asmAt DAtoH svArTe 'san' pratyayaH viDIyate  'nivAse' asmin arTe tu san-pratyayaH na viDIyate apitu curAdigaRavat rUpARi Bavanti
info.arTaH: nivAse rogApanayane vyADipratIkAre nigrahe apanayane nASane saMSaye ca
info.english_meaning: to stay to cure to carry out medical examination to fight disease
info.hindI_arTa: nivAsa karanA roga kA pratikAra karanA cikitsA karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: arTanirdeSasya upalakzaRatvAt arTAntarezu vfttiH  ' kitervyADipratIkAre nigrahe apanayane nASane saMSaye ca ' iti nibadDezvarTezu ' guptijkidByaH san ' iti san vihitaH ' iti tatvaboDinIwIkA  ' nivAse tu ketayati ( curAdO uktaH)' iti si.kOmudI  ABaraRakAraH asya AtmanepadaM manute  mA.DA.vfttO tat KaRqitam

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'saNketo gfhyate jAtO guRadravyakriyAsu ca' (sA॰da॰) saNkato rUQiH saNketaH kAminoniScitapUrvaM saNgamasTAnam
kAntArTinI tu yA yAti saNketaM sABisArikA (amaraH)
'saM jAnate manasA saM cikitre' (f0 10306) saMcikitre=saMcikitire saMketayanti samyak paSyanti buDyante
'sA hEnamaBirADayAYcakAra sa vyacikitsajjuhavAni mA hOzam' (Sa0 brA0 2246) vyacikitsat=vyamfSat=vyacArayat
'anantaraM kzatriyasya tatra kiM vicikitsyate' (BA0 SAM0 13016) prAyaScittAdikaM kiM viDIyata ityAha
'nUnamiti vicitsArTIyo BAzAyAm' (ni0 1512) vicikitsA vivekapUrvako'BiprAya iti durgaH
'yeyaM prete vicikitsA manuzye astItyeke nAyamastIti cEke' (kaWopa0 1120) vicikitsA saMSayaH
'dravyasya vicikitsArTaM guRadozO SuBASuBO' (BA0 pu0 11213) vicikitsA tattvabuBatsA BAgavatAdanyatra durlaBo'yamarTaH
'na dakziRA vi cikite na savyA' (tE0 saM0 211117) vi cikite viSezeRa jAnAmi dakziRA=dakziRam savyA savyam
'vi vAM cikitsadftacidDa nArI' (f0 41610) vicikitsat saMSayitavatI sandidihe
